prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "2. Properties" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 3. Legal Proceedings".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 2's text:
- If the "Item 3" heading is visible on this page, Item 2 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 2 runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 2 at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:

Fremont Factory Fremont, California Owned
